title: This or That?
description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a [gold]suspicious bag of riches[/gold] and a clearly [purple]cursed relic[/purple].

[jitter][blue]"This... or That?"[/blue][/jitter]
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

options.title: That
options.description: Add [red]Clumsy[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: The [gold]Gold[/gold] reward is randomly determined between 41 and 69 each run. After making a choice, the event displays a flavor page describing the outcome: [gold]This[/gold] shows a struggle with a mysterious third hand, while [gold]That[/gold] depicts ghostly laughter and flame from the cursed relic.
